experience.title: Software Engineer Tech Lead
experience.description:
• Leading an international team of 7 developers and 4 QA analysts, driving delivery of high-quality software solutions through mentorship and Agile development
• Integrated external microservices using RESTful JSON APIs with Java, Spring Boot, and Angular for debit card maintenance and user functionality
• Engineered a secure authentication framework leveraging OAuth 2.0, JWT, and mTLS integrated with AS/400 DB2 backend to enable RESTful API adoption
• Managed feature branches and pull requests using Git version control within Bitbucket to support agile development cycles and continuous integration

experience.title: Software Engineer II
experience.description:
• Refactored legacy IBM iSeries applications by implementing RPGLE Free Format to enhance code readability and maintainability
• Spearheaded the transition from DDS to DDL, aligning database structures with modern relational database standards
• Implemented IBM AS/400 integrated database systems, enhancing operational efficiency and data integrity
• Maintained Electronic Funds Transfer (EFT) standards in compliance with ISO 8583 messaging protocols for secure transaction processing
• Collaborated weekly with Customer Support to align development with client needs

experience.title: Senior Technical Analyst
experience.description:
• Deployed applications on AWS and Azure, optimizing for scalability and reliability in cloud environments
• Administered MariaDB and MySQL databases, ensuring high availability and performance for substantial financial transaction processing
• Specialized in Linux system administration, configuring and deploying applications across RedHat, CentOS, AlmaLinux, and Amazon Linux distributions
• Implemented IBM AS/400 integrated database systems and developed XML-based ATM user interfaces adhering to XFS standards
• Leveraged JIRA for Agile project management, facilitating effective backlog prioritization and sprint tracking
• Mentored new team members, fostering a culture of continuous learning in the fintech sector

experience.title: Technical Analyst
experience.description:
• Developed and debugged enterprise-level RPGLE, Free Format RPGLE, and SQL RPGLE programs
• Implemented IBM AS/400 integrated database systems, enhancing operational efficiency and data integrity
• Interpreted technical specifications to deliver precise and quality-driven results
• Collaborated with international clients to develop customized solutions
• Successfully deployed IBM applications within highly available environments
